prompt:
Dear valued customer,

Our records indicate that there has been an unusual login attempt to your online banking account. To protect your security, we have temporarily suspended your account. Please verify your identity by clicking the link below and following the instructions.

https://securebank-auth.com/verify?user=123456789

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Bank Security Team
Dear valued customer, we observe suspicious activity on your acct. Please verify your info at https://bank-secure-verify.com now. Thank you.

Subject: Congratulations! You Have Won Our Exclusive Prize!

Dear Valued Customer,

We are delighted to inform you that you have been selected as the winner of our annual Global Excellence Award. As a valued member of our community, you are entitled to receive a premium gift pack worth $5,000.

To claim your prize, please verify your account details by clicking the secure link below:

https://secure.globalexcellence.com/claim-prize

Thank you for your continued support. We look forward to celebrating your success.

Best regards,
Global Excellence Awards Team

URGENT: Your account has been LOCKED due to suspicious logins. ACT NOW by visiting http://bank-secure-login.co/verify to unlock. If you do NOT respond within 10 minutes, your account will be permanently CLOSED. THIS IS NOT A JOKE!!!

Dear Valued Account Holder,

Our records indicate potential irregularities with your account activity. To protect your assets, please review the recent transactions and confirm your identity by logging into your account via the secure link below.

https://www.yourbank-secure.com/verify

Failure to verify within 48 hours may result in temporary account suspension.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Customer Support Team

Dear Valued Customer, we noticed a problem wit your account and we need some info to resolve it. Pleas fill in the form at http://secure-bank-verify.com/account to confirm your identity. Thank you for watching our bank!

Congratulations! You have been selected as the grand prize winner in our annual loyalty program sweepstakes. To claim your $5,000 reward, please verify your identity by submitting your bank details and a recent selfie at https://secure-winprize.com/verify. This process is mandatory to comply with anti‑fraud regulations. Thank you for your continued support and enjoy your prize!
Attention! Your account will be permanently disabled unless you immediately provide your login credentials. Respond now: http://malicious-site.net/verifyaccount

Dear valued customer,

We have detected an unusual activity on your account and as a precautionary measure, we have temporarily suspended certain features to protect your security. To review the activity and restore full access, please log in to your secure banking portal using the link below:

https://www.yourbank.com/secure-login

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to contact our dedicated support team at 1-800-123-4567 or reply to this email.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

YourBank Security Team
Dear customer, we noticed some activity on your accout. Please verfiy your info at www.bank-verify.com for securty. Thank you for your coopertion!

Dear valued client,

We have detected unusual activity on your account. In order to protect your information, we have temporarily suspended access. Please verify your identity by following the link below:
https://secure.examplebank.com/account/verify

Failure to complete this verification within 24 hours may result in permanent account closure.

Thank you for your immediate attention.

Sincerely,
Compliance Department

Hello, congratulations! You have been selected as one of our lucky participants in the annual sweepstakes. Please confirm your prize by sending your mailing address to the email below. Thanks for participating!
